в—Һз®ҖгҖҖгҖҖд»Ӣ  

гҖҖгҖҖThe evil mastermind Fu Manchu plots his latest scheme to basically freeze over the Earth's oceans with his moxia.cc diabolical new device. Opposing him is his arch-nemesis, Interpol's very British Dr. Nayland Smith.
